--- title: "" format: html: theme: none css: styles.css toc: false smooth-scroll: true page-layout: full execute: echo: false warning: false message: false --- ::: {.cell} ::: ::: {.page-shell} ::: {.masthead} ::: {.masthead-main} # Robby De Pauw

Senior Researcher · Visiting Professor · Biostatistics, Epidemiology, and Data-driven Health Research

::: ::: {.masthead-side} **Website** [robbydepauw.be](https://www.robbydepauw.be/) **Email** [robby.depauw@sciensano.be](robby.depauw@sciensano.be) **Location** Belgium ::: ::: ::: {.section-nav .no-print} [About](#about) [Experience](#experience) [Education](#education) [Publications](#publications) [Shiny apps](#apps) [Projects](#projects) [PhD theses](#phd-theses) [Contact](#contact) ::: ## About {#about} I am a Senior Researcher at Sciensano and Visiting Professor at Ghent University. My work focuses on epidemiology, burden of disease, survey analysis, rehabilitation research, and the development of data-driven tools in R and Shiny. I am particularly interested in translating complex health data into actionable insights for research, policy, and clinical practice. ## Experience {#experience} ### Senior Researcher — Sciensano Public health monitoring, epidemiology, burden of disease, survey analyses, and dissemination tools. ### Visiting Professor — Ghent University Teaching and supervision in biostatistics and epidemiology. ## Education {#education} ### PhD in Health Sciences Ghent University ### MSc in Statistical Data Analysis Ghent University ### MSc in Rehabilitation Sciences and Physiotherapy Ghent University ## Publications {#publications}
